summary: The diff addresses REQ-1 by removing `min-h-screen` from the root layout div in App.tsx, which was causing extra black space below the footer in desktop view. The fix is minimal and targeted, matching the requirement. Supporting CSS changes in index.css set background colors to cream/white for html, body, and #root, preventing any dark background from showing through. The footer content and styling are preserved. No hallucinated features were detected beyond the primary fix.
